archetypes.name: Aggro
archetypes.description: Fast proactive shell focused on ending the game before slower decks can stabilize.
archetypes.gameplan: Deploy efficient early threats, convert tempo into damage, and use cheap disruption to keep attacking.

archetypes.name: Midrange
archetypes.description: Flexible shell that trades resources early and wins through stronger standalone cards and board control.
archetypes.gameplan: Interact early, stabilize the board, then pull ahead with resilient threats and efficient material advantage.
win_conditions: Sustained combat pressure from superior threats

archetypes.name: Control
archetypes.description: Reactive shell built to prolong the game, answer opposing threats, and eventually win from a dominant late-game position.
archetypes.gameplan: Trade resources efficiently, suppress opposing development, and convert inevitability into a clean finish.
win_conditions: Inevitability through repeated answers and late-game dominance
A small number of finishers after stabilization

archetypes.name: Tempo
archetypes.description: Pressure-plus-disruption shell that seeks to get ahead on board and keep the opponent off balance.
archetypes.gameplan: Stick an efficient threat, protect it, and trade mana favorably while continuing to attack.
win_conditions: Incremental evasive damage backed by efficient disruption

archetypes.name: Ramp
archetypes.description: Mana-acceleration shell built to jump ahead on mana and deploy oversized threats or scalable effects early.
archetypes.gameplan: Accelerate mana development, then leverage that mana advantage into large threats or mana sinks.
win_conditions: Mana advantage into overwhelming late-game pressure

archetypes.name: Tokens
archetypes.description: Wide-board synergy archetype built around producing many tokens and converting them into pressure or value.
archetypes.gameplan: Generate many bodies, then scale them with global buffs, go-wide rewards, or sacrifice conversions.

archetypes.name: Aristocrats
archetypes.description: Sacrifice-value archetype that turns expendable permanents and death loops into damage or resource gain.
archetypes.gameplan: Create fodder, sacrifice it repeatedly, and convert those deaths into drain, cards, recursion, or board advantage.

archetypes.name: Reanimator
archetypes.description: Graveyard-focused archetype that puts large creatures into the graveyard and returns them directly to the battlefield ahead of curve.
archetypes.gameplan: Stock the graveyard quickly, then reanimate oversized threats before they could normally be cast.
win_conditions: Early battlefield deployment of oversized threats

archetypes.name: Counters
archetypes.description: Synergy archetype built around accumulating and exploiting +1/+1 counters for scaling pressure or value.
archetypes.gameplan: Develop creatures with counters, then multiply or exploit those counters for superior board presence.
win_conditions: Counter synergies turning growth into advantage

archetypes.name: Spellslinger
archetypes.description: Spell-synergy archetype centered on repeatedly casting noncreature spells for damage, cards, or board presence.
archetypes.gameplan: Chain cheap spells, trigger spell payoffs, and convert spell volume into pressure or advantage.
win_conditions: Overwhelming value from repeated spell triggers

archetypes.name: Blink
archetypes.description: Value-engine archetype built around reusing enter-the-battlefield effects through exile-and-return effects.
archetypes.gameplan: Assemble ETB permanents and blink effects, then repeatedly reuse those ETB triggers for cards, removal, or board advantage.
win_conditions: Value accumulation from repeated ETB reuse
Board control through repeated ETB effects

archetypes.name: Graveyard Value
archetypes.description: Recursive grind archetype that treats the graveyard as a long-term resource rather than a one-shot combo zone.
archetypes.gameplan: Fill the graveyard, recur cards repeatedly, and outlast the opponent through recursive material advantage.

archetypes.name: Typal
archetypes.description: Synergy archetype built around a specific creature type and subtype-based rewards.
archetypes.gameplan: Concentrate on one creature type, then amplify it with subtype-based payoffs, lords, and tribal support pieces.

archetypes.name: Goodstuff
archetypes.description: Low-synergy shell built from individually strong, efficient cards rather than a dedicated mechanical engine.
archetypes.gameplan: Play generically powerful threats, answers, and value cards without relying on a narrow synergy package.
win_conditions: Winning through superior average card quality
